summary: Successfully tested TA-visualization migration from Chart Lab to Research. Verified code changes and frontend functionality through browser automation testing.
passed_tests: Research page loads without errors and displays correctly
Research page contains useRenderPlan hook import from marketStore
Research page contains RenderPlanOverlay import from renderers
Research page has showTAOverlay state initialized to true
Research page renders RenderPlanOverlay with showTAOverlay condition
Research page has functional TA Overlay toggle button (data-testid='ta-overlay-toggle-btn')
Chart Lab page loads without errors and displays correctly
Chart Lab page correctly removed useRenderPlan, RenderPlanOverlay, showRenderPlan
Chart Lab page does not contain TA Overlay toggle button
Chart Lab page contains prediction/hypothesis functionality (Forecast, Deviation buttons)
State isolation working: Research uses showTAOverlay, Chart Lab has no TA states
Navigation between Research and Chart Lab works correctly
TA functionality restored when navigating back to Research
success_percentage: 100% - All migration requirements successfully implemented and verified
